main.description: A public, homogeneous Collection of Referenceable members. Membership/relationship records live under app.zurfur.graph.* (mirroring app.bsky.graph.list). A Collection is a typed bag of references ("a reference, not a label"): either Static (an explicit hand-curated bag) or Dynamic (a Lens query evaluated live). Versioned in place — additive, optional-tolerant. See DESIGN: Collection-as-Referenceable DD (24182787), Collections (8912899), Lens (10453000), Lexicon (10354710).

name.description: Display name of the collection (e.g. "Favorite artists").

description.description: Optional free-text description of the collection.

memberType.description: The single Referenceable kind this collection holds; every member is of this kind (homogeneous). Open set (knownValues, not a closed enum) so additional kinds — e.g. character, post — can be added in a later backward-compatible revision without breaking existing records. v1 coverage: account, user.

membership.description: Exactly one of Static (an explicit member list) or Dynamic (a Lens spec). Open union (closed=false) so the version-in-place convention can add a membership mode additively.

static.description: Static membership: an explicit, hand-curated bag of typed member references. Order belongs to the surface, not this record. References are live — a member silently drops if it is privatized or deleted.

members.description: The explicit member references. Each is of the collection's memberType (homogeneous).

items.description: A typed member reference: a DID for DID-anchored members, or an internal id for Index-local members. Open union (closed=false) so further reference forms can be added additively.

dynamic.description: Dynamic membership: a Lens spec evaluated live to derive the bag. The Lens decides membership only; per-viewer visibility and order are applied by the surface/Engine, never stored here.

lens.description: The Lens specification ({ source, filter, sort }). Shape is a placeholder pending a dedicated Lens-lexicon DD.

didRef.description: A reference to a DID-anchored Referenceable member (e.g. an Account or User; later a Character). Addressed by its did:plc.

indexRef.description: A reference to an Index-local Referenceable member that is not DID-anchored (e.g. a Post). Addressed by its internal Index id. No v1 memberType uses this form, but it is authored so the typed-reference union is faithful to the DD.
